memory.summary: I have a plan to finish my assignment analysis and reading, but my cohort is inviting me to lunch now.
I've made solid progress on the assignment analysis, but my cohort is gathering for lunch now. I need to decide whether to join them or continue working given my moderate stress and sleep debt.
I missed the deadline for the analysis section despite making progress, which increases my stress and sleep debt.
I finished the analysis section but missed the reading deadline, increasing my stress and sleep debt.
I made good progress on the analysis section, but I'm still behind on other deadlines and carrying a sleep debt of 2 hours.
I made final progress on the analysis section, but my extremely low energy and high stress suggest I am physically unable to continue working effectively.
The analysis section is complete, but my severe sleep debt and exhaustion mean I cannot continue working effectively right now.
I worked 1.5 hours on assigned reading, but my zero energy and high stress indicate I cannot continue effectively.
Despite working 1.5 hours on assigned reading, my zero energy and high stress confirm I am physically unable to continue effectively.
After working 1.5 hours on reading, my energy remains at zero and stress is high, confirming I cannot continue effectively despite minor progress.
After another 2 hours of reading with minimal progress, my zero energy and high stress confirm I am physically unable to continue effectively.
Despite working 2 more hours, my zero energy and high stress confirm I am physically unable to continue effectively.
